summary: Audience recording sounds wonderful, though no performance details are provided.
review: The reviewer praises the audio quality, calling it "wonderful" and hoping a master copy exists, which suggests a clear and pleasant audience capture. No comments were made about the musical performance, setlist flow, or individual band members, so those aspects remain unassessed.

ai_rating.rationale: A single 4‑star review highlights excellent sounding audio but provides no insight into the show itself; rating reflects strong recording quality with unknown performance merit.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Clear, pleasant sound; reviewer notes no issues and wishes for a master copy, indicating high satisfaction with the capture.
